info.title: Articles Service
info.description: API for indexing press articles and linking them to outlets, journalists, and topics

snippet.description: Short text excerpt from the article or search result

articleChannel.description: Channel or vertical the article belongs to

author.description: Serialized author data extracted via scraping (JSON array of ExtractedAuthor objects)

ogTitle.example: AI Funding Hits Record High in Q1 2025

articleAuthor.description: Raw author string from article:author meta tag

articleModified.description: Last modified date from article metadata

markdownLength.description: Character count of the raw markdown fetched from the scraping service (before LLM truncation)

createdAt.description: When this article record was first created

updatedAt.description: When this article record was last updated

articleUrl.description: Canonical URL of the article (used as upsert key)

snippet.description: Short text excerpt from the article

articleAuthor.description: Raw author string from article:author meta tag

updatedAt.description: When this topic was last updated

brandIds.description: Brands this discovery is scoped to

outletId.description: Outlet linked to this discovery (if from outlet discovery)

journalistId.description: Journalist linked to this discovery (if from journalist discovery)

articleId.description: ID of the article to link

outletId.description: Outlet to associate with this discovery

journalistId.description: Journalist to associate with this discovery

topicId.description: Topic to associate with this discovery

discoveries.description: Array of discovery records to create

computedTitle.description: Best-effort title derived from og:title, twitter:title, or snippet

computedAuthors.description: Deduplicated list of author names extracted from all metadata sources

computedPublishedAt.description: Best-effort publication date from available metadata

lastActivityAt.description: Most recent update across all linked records

articleCreatedAt.description: When the article was first indexed

offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

articleId.description: ID of the upserted article record

title.description: Article title from OpenGraph or search result

authors.description: Authors extracted via scraping + LLM analysis

publishedAt.description: Publication date extracted from article metadata

type.description: Whether this author is a person or an organization (news agency, editorial team, etc.)

firstName.description: First name (empty string for organizations or single-name authors)

lastName.description: Last name, or full name for organizations

outletDomain.description: Outlet domain to scope the Google News search via site: filter (e.g. 'techcrunch.com')

sourceBrandId.description: Brand UUID to transfer from source org

targetBrandId.description: Brand UUID in target org to rewrite to (when target org already has the same domain)

post.summary: Create or upsert an article by URL
post.description: Inserts a new article or updates an existing one based on the articleUrl (unique key). Returns the full article record.

get.summary: Get a single article by ID

post.description: Upserts multiple articles in a single transaction. Each article is matched by articleUrl.

post.summary: Create or upsert a topic by name
Link an article to a campaign context (org/brand/feature/campaign)
post.description: Creates a discovery record that links an article to a specific org/brand/campaign context. Requires x-brand-id and x-campaign-id headers. Optionally associates the discovery with an outlet, journalist, or topic.

get.description: List discoveries with optional filters. Supports filtering by featureDynastySlug (resolves to all versioned slugs via features-service), featureSlugs (comma-separated or single value), and equivalent workflow filters. Dynasty slug takes priority over slugs list.

schema.description: Filter by feature slugs (comma-separated or single value)

parameters.description: Filter by feature slugs (comma-separated or single value)
parameters.name: featureSlugs

schema.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via features-service)

parameters.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via features-service)
parameters.name: featureDynastySlug

schema.description: Filter by workflow slugs (comma-separated or single value)

parameters.description: Filter by workflow slugs (comma-separated or single value)
parameters.name: workflowSlugs

schema.description: Filter by workflow dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via workflow-service)

parameters.description: Filter by workflow dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via workflow-service)
parameters.name: workflowDynastySlug

schema.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination
parameters.name: offset

200.description: List of discoveries with article data

post.summary: Bulk link articles to campaign contexts
Discover recent articles from an outlet via Google News + scraping, and create scoped discoveries
post.description: Pipeline endpoint: (1) searches Google News for recent articles from the given outlet domain, (2) scrapes each article URL to extract authors and publication dates via LLM, (3) upserts the articles in the database, and (4) creates discovery records scoped to the campaign (x-brand-id, x-campaign-id headers required). Returns the discovered articles with extracted author details.

post.summary: Discover recent publications by a journalist and create scoped discoveries
post.description: Pipeline endpoint: (1) searches Google News for recent articles by the given journalist (by name), (2) scrapes each article URL to extract authors and publication dates via LLM, (3) upserts the articles in the database, and (4) creates discovery records scoped to the campaign and journalist (x-brand-id, x-campaign-id headers required). Ideal for enriching pitch generation with a journalist's recent work.

get.description: Returns all articles matching the given URLs. Used by other services to check which articles are already indexed. Pass URLs as a comma-separated query parameter.

Get aggregated discovery stats optionally filtered by orgId, brandId, campaignId, workflowSlug, featureSlug, workflowDynastySlug, and/or featureDynastySlug. Dynasty slug filters resolve to all versioned slugs via the respective service. When groupBy is provided, returns grouped results.

schema.description: Filter by workflow dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via workflow-service)

parameters.description: Filter by workflow dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via workflow-service)
parameters.name: workflowDynastySlug

schema.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via features-service)

parameters.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via features-service)
parameters.name: featureDynastySlug

200.description: Aggregated stats (flat or grouped depending on groupBy parameter)

get.description: Same as GET /v1/stats but only requires X-API-Key (no x-org-id, x-user-id, x-run-id headers). Used by other services for stats aggregation.

schema.description: Filter by workflow dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via workflow-service)

parameters.description: Filter by workflow dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via workflow-service)
parameters.name: workflowDynastySlug

schema.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via features-service)

parameters.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via features-service)
parameters.name: featureDynastySlug

200.description: Aggregated stats (flat or grouped depending on groupBy parameter)

post.summary: Re-assign solo-brand rows from one org to another
post.description: For every table that stores brand references alongside org_id, updates org_id from sourceOrgId to targetOrgId on rows that reference only the given brandId (solo-brand). Skips co-branding rows (multiple brand IDs). Idempotent.
